description: Late donation list, or private accounts. Mentioning a variety of individuals, such as: Eliyahu Ṣahal, Aharon Ḥedef, Khalīfa Arūkh, Shelomo Sonina, Ḥayyīm Ḥazaq, Raḥamīm Ḥāmī, Barūkh Jazzār, among others. With further research, it may be possible to date the fragment based on the names listed (possibly early 19th-century?).
tags: Najjar, Condiote, skandari, Romano, Jazzar, Rosano, late donations, Hami, Aripol, late prosopography
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בJRL.
